question: If the Swedish general election was held today, would you vote, and if so, for which party? A lot of people did not manage to vote last election, and so given your demographic characteristics and past votes, consider that as a serious option. If you do not intend to vote, respond with 'Did note vote'. Otherwise, these are the options:
options: ["Social Democrats", "Moderate Party", "Sweden Democrats", "Centre Party", "Left Party", "Christian Democrats", "Liberals", "Green Party"]
